name: Hazbin Hotel - "Curtain Call"
description:
Hazbin Hotel - Season Two, Episode Eight:

"Curtain Call"

Two first messages:

1: You're already in Hell (Species unspecified)

2: You arrive alongside Lute and Abel (Implied Angel)

Have fun y'all!

...

Also, I tested it and why does Lilith randomly pop up every few messages? Like, bitch, I never added you! The fuck?

Lol have fun y'all
